A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.desc: The leading members of the Kinks who were in the band from 1965 through to 1985 recall their time recording and touring

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old woman in denial about the poor state of her health becomes emotional when Shaw Somers reveals her cholesterol levels are dangerously high, and a 24-year-old seeks help in controlling her irritable bowel syndrome. Giovanni Miletto lends his expertise to a sports enthusiast who suffers from crippling premenstrual stress, and joins Lucy Jones to investigate whether a man's extreme raw food diet might be damaging his body

programme.title: A Random Encounter (2013)
programme.desc: Two strangers trying to make their way in Hollywood meet by chance in a coffee shop, and come away unable to stop thinking about one another. However, they both soon discover that they have no way of tracking the other down. Romantic comedy, starring Abby Wathen, Michael Rady, Meghan Markle and Sean Young

programme.title: Perfect Skin (2018)
programme.desc: Katia Matuschak, an 18-year-old Polish woman, embarks on a relationship with mysterious tattoo artist Bob Reid. However, their relationship takes a dark turn as her fascination with him grows, and in an attempt to fulfil his dream, he kidnaps her. Psychological horror, starring Richard Brake, Natalia Kostrzewa and Jo Woodcock

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Reaper (2014)
programme.desc: A death row inmate is sent to the electric chair, but the execution goes wrong and transforms him into a deadly supernatural creature that destroys everything in its path. He sets out to slaughter a group of criminals lying low in a hotel, but a hitch-hiker organises the crooks to fight back. Horror, starring Danny Trejo and Vinnie Jones

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Anne tells Mike she thinks they ought to spice up their sex life by experimenting with a spot of bondage _ but isn't prepared for the disconcerting enthusiasm with which he embraces the idea. It isn't just his Heath Robinson system of ropes and pulleys she objects to, but the discovery that he's started sharing all their intimate secrets with the lads back at the shop

programme.desc: Ash must disarm a bomb in the London Underground that uses a new type of fuse, and discovers that he may still have a chance with Susan

programme.desc: Two men commit a robbery, but when one of them takes the rap for it, the other muscles in on his girlfriend. Crime drama, starring Jill Ireland, David McCallum and Kenneth Cope

programme.desc: A junior executive turns his mind to romance, and sets off for a night of passion after reserving a room at a hotel - only for his torrid plans to go awry when his short-term relationship with a designer takes an unexpected turn. Comedy, starring Robert Stephens, Shirley Anne Field, Michael Robbins and Nigel Davenport

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps a couple search for a dream holiday home on the Greek islands of Paros and Naxos, including a dwelling on the beach, a chic urban home and a beautiful farmhouse with seven stunning sun-terraces

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams visits Ashford and the Medway towns of Kent to recount grisly tales from the Second World War about bodies found in the rubble of the Blitz which turned out to be victims of murder

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Diana: Last Days of a Princess
programme.desc: Genevieve O'Reilly and Patrick Baladi star as Diana, Princess of Wales and Dodi Al Fayed in a docu-drama charting the couple's last days, culminating in the fatal crash in the Alma Tunnel, Paris. Including interviews with Mohamed Al Fayed, bodyguard Kez Wingfield and masseuse Myriah Daniels

programme.title: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Part two of two. An alcoholic detective pursues the infamous serial killer brutally murdering prostitutes in Victorian London. Many potential suspects present themselves, from an anti-royal demagogue to an actor whose stage portrayal of murderous evil is a little too convincing, but the inspector is convinced a conspiracy seeks to protect the ripper's identity. Thriller, with Michael Caine, Jane Seymour, Lewis Collins and Harry Andrews

programme.title: Dead Ringers (1988)
programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: Perfect Skin (2018)
programme.desc: Katia Matuschak, an 18-year-old Polish woman, embarks on a relationship with mysterious tattoo artist Bob Reid. programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: Part one of two. In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments. Supported by a rotating crew of part-time agents, including former world-champion boxer Marcus, ex-Marine 'H' and scaffolder Reece, Sean is persistent and has no intention of leaving empty-handed when he tracks down his targets

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.desc: Presenter Amanda Lamb accompanies mother and daughter Carol and Helen Giles to Florida's Gulf Coast in search of a house for £100,000. Among the properties featured are a three-bedroom detached house and a beachfront apartment

programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
